Name: LOCK_ON_PARAM
Description: Defines the targeting range, angle limits, and screen-space constraints used by the lock-on targeting system.

Fields.Name: Maximum Lock-On Distance
Fields.Description: Maximum distance at which a target can be locked onto. In metres.

Fields.Name: Lock-On Attack Effective Distance
Fields.Description: Maximum distance at which attacks remain effective while locked onto a target. In metres.

Fields.Name: Lock-On Distance
Fields.Description: Standard range used for acquiring and maintaining target lock-on. In metres.

Fields.Name: Lock Area Height
Fields.Description: Vertical percentage of the screen or detection region used for valid lock-on targeting.

Fields.Name: Lock Area Width
Fields.Description: Horizontal percentage of the screen or detection region used for valid lock-on targeting.

Fields.Name: Maximum Vertical Lock Angle
Fields.Description: Maximum upward and downward angle allowed for maintaining target lock-on.

Fields.Name: Maximum Horizontal Lock Angle
Fields.Description: Maximum left and right angle allowed for maintaining target lock-on.

Fields.Name: Out-of-View Lock Distance
Fields.Description: Distance at which targets outside the camera view can still be locked onto. In metres.
